strings.auth.login.title: Sign In
strings.auth.login.subtitle: Authenticate to access the supervisor panel.
strings.auth.change_password.warning: You must set a new password before using the panel.
strings.auth.change_password.rules: Rules: minimum 8 characters and must be different from your current password.
strings.validation.password.min_length: New password must be at least 8 characters.
strings.validation.password.mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
strings.validation.password.same_as_current: New password must be different from current password.
strings.topnav.news.title: Chirper Feed
strings.topnav.news.install_confirm: Install latest update now? The panel and gateway may restart.
strings.news.page.title: News
strings.news.page.subtitle: Manage message status for {server_id}
strings.news.page.error.permissions: Your permissions do not allow news access on this server.
strings.console.page.access_denied.title: Access denied
strings.console.page.access_denied.message: Your role does not allow console/log access on this server.
strings.console.page.read_only_runtime: Read-only runtime view for your role.
strings.console.page.live_console.title: Live Console
strings.console.page.live_console.subtitle: SSE stream (Supervisor logs + Enshrouded logs).
strings.news.item.update_check_failed.title: Update check failed
strings.news.item.update_available.title: Update available: v{latest_version}
strings.news.item.update_ok.title: Update status
strings.news.item.cron_missing.title: {cron_key} schedule missing
strings.news.item.cron_missing.message: {cron_key} is not set. Configure it in Env tab for server '{server_id}'.
strings.news.item.startup_config_missing.title: Startup JSON not found
strings.news.item.startup_config_missing.message: Configured startup config does not exist: {startup_config_path}
strings.news.item.auth_secret_ephemeral.title: AUTH secret not persisted
strings.news.item.auth_secret_ephemeral.message: SUPERVISOR_GATEWAY_AUTH_SECRET is not set explicitly. A random value is generated on start.
strings.news.item.api_token_ephemeral.title: API token not persisted
strings.news.item.api_token_ephemeral.message: SUPERVISOR_GATEWAY_API_TOKEN is not set explicitly. A random value is generated on start.
strings.news.item.auth_guest_default_password_ac: Guest account still uses default password
Guest account is enabled and still flagged for mandatory password change (default password likely unchanged).
strings.news.item.auth_viewer_default_password_a: Viewer account still uses default password
Viewer account is enabled and still flagged for mandatory password change (default password likely unchanged).
strings.news.item.http_local_only.title: Gateway runs in HTTP localhost-only mode
strings.news.item.http_local_only.message: HTTPS is disabled, but insecure HTTP is limited to localhost. Remote panel access is intentionally blocked.
strings.news.item.http_remote_exposed.title: Gateway exposed over plain HTTP
strings.news.item.http_remote_exposed.message: SUPERVISOR_GATEWAY_REQUIRE_HTTPS=false and SUPERVISOR_GATEWAY_INSECURE_HTTP_LOCAL_ONLY=false. Traffic can be intercepted.
strings.news.item.https_cert_or_key_missing.mess: HTTPS is required, but configured cert/key file path does not exist. Check SUPERVISOR_GATEWAY_TLS_CERTFILE and SUPERVISOR_GATEWAY_TLS_KEYFILE.
strings.news.item.https_self_signed_expected.mes: Self-signed TLS in use (IP-only mode). Browsers will warn unless clients trust this certificate/CA. For no warnings, use domain + public CA.
strings.news.item.tls_cert_expired.title: TLS certificate expired
strings.news.item.tls_cert_expired.message: The configured TLS certificate expired {days} day(s) ago.
strings.news.item.tls_cert_expires_soon.title: TLS certificate expires soon
strings.news.item.tls_cert_expires_soon_today.me: The configured TLS certificate expires today.
strings.news.item.tls_cert_expires_soon_days.mes: The configured TLS certificate expires in {days} day(s).
strings.news.item.cors_wildcard_origin.title: CORS allows all origins
strings.news.item.cors_wildcard_origin.message: SUPERVISOR_GATEWAY_CORS_ORIGINS contains '*'. Prefer explicit origins only.
strings.news.item.cors_domain_missing.title: Panel origin is not whitelisted in CORS
strings.news.item.cors_domain_missing.message: Current panel origin '{request_origin}' is not present in SUPERVISOR_GATEWAY_CORS_ORIGINS.
strings.news.item.https_proxy_headers_enabled.me: SUPERVISOR_GATEWAY_TRUST_PROXY_HEADERS=true. Ensure only your trusted reverse proxy can reach this service.
strings.news.item.env_startup_only.title: Env values are startup configuration
strings.news.item.env_startup_only.message: Set or change Env variables in your container runtime config (docker compose, docker run, or env file), then recreate or restart the container. Changes made in the panel are not persisted.
strings.news.item.roles_info.title: Role guide: tabs and permissions
strings.news.item.roles_info.message:
User permissions are read from auth user JSON files in SUPERVISOR_GATEWAY_AUTH_USERS_DIR.
You can define custom roles and permissions per user without code changes.
strings.news.item.support_reminder.title: Support this project
strings.news.item.support_reminder.message: This addon is a one-person passion build. If it powers your server, a coffee keeps new features, fixes, and late-night updates coming.
strings.api.logs.error.supervisor_stream_only: supervisor channel supports stream endpoint only

strings.files.page.title: File Manager
strings.files.page.error.read_forbidden: Your role does not allow reading files on this server.
strings.files.read_only_hint: Read-only mode: file writes are disabled for your role.
strings.files.table.name: Name
strings.files.modal.delete_folder_warning: This will remove the folder and all nested files.
strings.files.modal.delete_file_warning: This will permanently remove the file.
strings.files.error.write_forbidden: You do not have permission to write files on this server.
strings.files.error.upload_forbidden: You do not have permission to upload files on this server.
strings.backups.page.title: Backups
strings.backups.page.error.read_forbidden: Your role does not allow viewing backup files on this server.
strings.backups.read_only_hint: Read-only mode: backup creation is disabled for your role.
strings.backups.error.create_forbidden: You do not have permission to create backups on this server.
strings.backups.preflight.backup_cron_missing: BACKUP_CRON is not set. Set BACKUP_CRON (for example 0 */6 * * *) and restart the container to enable automatic and manual backups.
strings.config.page.title: Config Editor
strings.config.page.subtitle: Load and edit server config files.
strings.config.page.read_access_required: Read access to files is required to load config files.
strings.config.page.error.read_forbidden: You do not have permission to read config files.
strings.config.page.error.write_forbidden: You do not have permission to modify config files.

strings.env.page.error.read_forbidden: Your role does not allow reading server Env data.
strings.env.page.empty_group: No Env keys in this group

strings.activity.page.title: Activity
strings.activity.page.subtitle: Recent events for {server_id}
strings.activity.page.error.read_forbidden: Your role does not allow activity access on this server.
strings.power.read_only_hint: Your role is read-only for this server.
strings.power.warning.title: Warnings:
strings.status.400.title: Bad Request
strings.status.400.message: The request could not be processed in its current form.
strings.status.400.hint: Check request parameters and try again.
strings.status.401.title: Authentication Required
strings.status.401.message: You need to sign in before this resource can be accessed.
strings.status.401.hint: Log in again and retry your action.
strings.status.403.title: Access Forbidden
strings.status.403.message: Your account does not have permission for this operation.
strings.status.403.hint: Use an account with the required role or adjust permissions.
strings.status.404.title: Page Not Found
strings.status.404.message: The requested page or endpoint does not exist on this gateway.
strings.status.404.hint: Check the URL path and make sure the route is available.
strings.status.405.title: Method Not Allowed
strings.status.405.message: The HTTP method is not supported for this endpoint.
strings.status.405.hint: Use the method expected by the API route.
strings.status.408.title: Request Timeout
strings.status.408.message: The request timed out before completion.
strings.status.408.hint: Retry once network and backend latency stabilize.
strings.status.409.title: Conflict Detected
strings.status.409.message: The request conflicts with the current server state.
strings.status.409.hint: Refresh current data and retry with the latest state.
strings.status.413.title: Payload Too Large
strings.status.413.message: The request body exceeded the configured upload or write limit.
strings.status.413.hint: Reduce payload size or adjust gateway limits.
strings.status.415.title: Unsupported Media Type
strings.status.415.message: The server cannot process this content type.
strings.status.415.hint: Send payload in the expected format.
strings.status.429.title: Rate Limit Reached
strings.status.429.message: Too many requests were sent in a short period.
strings.status.500.title: Internal Server Error
strings.status.500.message: The gateway encountered an internal error.
strings.status.500.hint: Review service logs for the root cause.
strings.status.502.title: Bad Gateway
strings.status.502.message: The gateway received an invalid upstream response.
strings.status.502.hint: Check upstream services (RPC, container, reverse proxy).
strings.status.503.title: Service Unavailable
strings.status.503.hint: Verify process status and retry shortly.
strings.status.https_required.title: HTTPS Required
strings.status.https_required.message: This gateway only accepts encrypted HTTPS traffic.
strings.status.https_required.hint: Use https:// in the browser URL and ensure TLS is configured.
strings.status.generic.title: Request Failed
strings.status.generic.message: The request could not be completed.
strings.status.generic.hint: Retry the operation or inspect gateway logs for details.
strings.api.auth.error.login_disabled: Interactive login is disabled on this gateway.
strings.api.auth.error.change_password_requires_: Password change requires a user session.
strings.api.auth.error.preferences_requires_sess: Preferences update requires a user session.
strings.api.auth.error.preferences_missing: At least one preference is required.
strings.api.files.error.no_roots_configured: No file roots are configured for this server.
strings.api.files.error.roots_not_list: Files roots must be a list.
strings.api.files.error.file_too_large_read: File is too large to read.
strings.api.files.error.rename_item_invalid: Rename item requires source and target.
strings.api.files.error.upload_directory_invalid: Directory path is not a folder.
strings.api.files.error.upload_target_outside_wr: Upload target is outside writable roots.
